title: My Zombie Pet
description: Summon your own zombie pet to protect you!
body:
# My Zombie Pet

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/my-zombie-pet?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/my-zombie-pet)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

<hr>

![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/fG16kAr.png)

<hr>

## 📖 Description

By crafting the `Zombie Pet Egg` you can summon your own zombie pet to protect you!
You can give him armor and weapons, equip with totems and heal him by dropping rotten flesh.

If the zombie is riding a entity like a boat, does not teleport.

<hr>

## 🛠️ Recipe

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/VSWpHhS.png)

<hr>

## ⌨️ Commands

Give My Zombie Pet Egg:

```mcfunction
/loot give @a loot my_zombie_pet:zombie_pet_egg
```

Summon a Zombie Pet:

```mcfunction
/function my_zombie_pet:zombie/summon
```

<hr>
